regions.name: Blackmoor Keep
regions.description: A grim border fortress taken by night. Torches gutter in the wind, the dead lie where they fell, and rain hisses on hot stone where the gatehouse burns.

environmentalCodes.description: A cold, steady rain slicks the flagstones and the blades.

nodes.name: The Inner Ward
nodes.description: A cramped courtyard between the walls, littered with broken siege gear. The keep's great hall lies through an archway; the gatehouse smokes behind.

nodes.name: The Great Hall
nodes.description: A long stone hall of overturned benches and a cold hearth. The Black Captain has made it his seat, and the way out is the way you came.

nodes.name: The Burning Gatehouse
nodes.description: The gate is aflame, its timbers roaring and thick with smoke. A fallen portcullis blocks all but a narrow, choking path beneath.

environmentalCodes.description: Choking black smoke fills the gatehouse — no one lingers here and breathes easy.
